user.title: Dual Logic Thermostat
user.description: Configure your smart thermostat. At least one switch is required.

data_description.heat_setpoint: Heating turns on below this temperature (minus cold tolerance) and off above it (plus cold tolerance).
data_description.cool_setpoint: Cooling turns on above this temperature (plus hot tolerance) and off below it (minus hot tolerance).
data_description.hot_tolerance: Dead band above the cooling setpoint before cooling activates.
data_description.cold_tolerance: Dead band below the heating setpoint before heating activates.

error.no_switch_configured: You must configure at least one heating or cooling switch.
error.setpoints_overlap: The heating setpoint must be lower than the cooling setpoint.

error.no_switch_configured: You must configure at least one heating or cooling switch.
error.setpoints_overlap: The heating setpoint must be lower than the cooling setpoint.
